title: Need more "and if" qualifier capabilities for initiating automations
excerpt: Need to be able to move items to a specific group in another board, but also determine which board to move it to based on some column qualifications that do not currently exist (need to improve compatibility with Omnitas…

posts.author: kennedy (Kennedy Eckels)
posts.cookedHtml: Need to be able to move items to a specific group in another board, but also determine which board to move it to based on some column qualifications that do not currently exist (need to improve compatibility with Omnitas). Right now, the closest I can get is “If item is moved to group, move item to board,” but I need “If item is moved to group and if Level 1 is ____, move item to group in board.” There are not enough IF qualifiers for the “When this happens” part of the automation, basically. We can’t use the dropdown qualifier either, because in the Omnitas time reporting we are unable to realistically add a dropdown column.
